response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:12: AZKi introduces her new outfit and the next song. No vocal music. 2. 01:13-05:04: AZKi and Hoshimachi Suisei perform 'Redo'. Song title and creators identified from on-screen text. 3. Searched for lyrics using original song name and original artist (Konomi Suzuki). Lyrics found and translated. 4. Corrected end time to match video duration.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, AZKi, introducing her new outfit, followed by a musical performance of 'Redo' alongside guest performer Hoshimachi Suisei.

scenes.description: AZKi introduces her new outfit and the upcoming song. No vocal music plays.
AZKi and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song 'Redo'. On-screen credits identify the song title and creators.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
自分の過去に囚われ迷って
言い聞かせて全てを
自由に操れるかなんて
分からないよと空は霞んで
正解はどこ?
僕の手のひらに残る大事なもの
忘れない記憶何度でも
君を守り抜くと叫んで
巻き戻しの中掴んだ愛はそう
離しはしないから
散りばめた想い
今一度きりの願いへ
次への僕に託したよ
いつかの約束
光の道しるべになる
誓いをさあ君のため
最期まで
涙さえ力に変えてきっと
描いていた望む未来へ繋ぐよ
想像を超える事態に狂って
爪を立てては
もがき足掻いて心は
人生の過ちをもう何回
繰り返しては嫌いになって
泣いてても
君の憧れはいつも輝いてた
I'll come back (Yeah)
I'll come back (Yeah)
To your future (Go away)
僕は抗うだろう運命に
Breaking out (Yeah)
Breaking out (Yeah)
Breaking down (Yeah go away)
諦めちゃいないから
結ばれた意思は
独りきりじゃない強さへ
紡いだ糸を手繰り寄せ
見つけた瞳は
理想を現実に変える
世界はそう君のため
最初から
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Caught in the trap of my own past, I'm lost
Just telling myself it's not like that
Will I ever be able to control it freely?
I don't know, the sky is hazy
Where is the correct answer?
This important thing remains in the palm of my hand
Unforgettable memories, again and again
Screaming that I will protect you through to the end
The love I grasped in the rewinding time
I won't let go, because it's that
The scattered thoughts
Lead to a wish that can only be made once more
I entrusted it to the next me
The promise of someday
Will become a guiding light
Now, for you, I make this vow
Until the very end
Changing even tears into power, I'm sure
I'll connect it to the desired future we depicted
Going crazy over situations beyond imagination
Digging in my claws
Struggling and scratching, my heart
I don't want to repeat the mistakes of my life
Over and over, and come to hate them
Even if I'm crying
Your longing was always shining
I'll come back (Yeah)
I'll come back (Yeah)
To your future (Go away)
I'll resist destiny
Breaking out (Yeah)
Breaking out (Yeah)
Breaking down (Yeah go away)
I won't give up
The joined will
To a strength that isn't alone
Pulling on the spun threads
The eyes I found
Will change the ideal into reality
The world is for you from the very beginning
